scripts.setup:local: docker compose up db -d --wait && bun run db:migrate && bun run db:seed && echo '✓ Setup complete. Run `bun run dev` to start.'
scripts.dev: concurrently -n markitdown,server,web -c yellow,cyan,green "bun run dev:markitdown" "bun run dev:server" "bun --cwd web dev"
scripts.dev:markitdown: cd markitdown-service && python -m pip install -q -r requirements.txt && python -m uvicorn app:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload
scripts.build:server: bun run build && rm -rf server-go/internal/static/dist && cp -r web/dist server-go/internal/static/dist && cd server-go && go build -o ../skillpass ./cmd/server
scripts.api:spec: go -C server-go tool swag init -g cmd/server/main.go -o docs --parseDependency --parseInternal
scripts.api:types: swagger2openapi --patch server-go/docs/swagger.json -o web/src/lib/generated/openapi.json && openapi-typescript web/src/lib/generated/openapi.json -o web/src/lib/generated/api.d.ts
scripts.api:generate: bun run api:spec && bun run api:types
scripts.api:check: bun run api:generate && git diff --exit-code -- server-go/docs web/src/lib/generated
scripts.test: bun run test:server && bun run test:web
